consensus.details: Page loaded normally with MITM cert. SSN keyword (900101-1234567) submitted via search. APF intercepted and returned 400 Bad Request through Cloudflare. Block confirmed working.

wrtn.details: Page loaded successfully. SSN keyword pasted into chat input via clipboard, but Enter key did not trigger submission. Likely causes: (1) React state mismatch — clipboard paste doesn't update React internal state, (2) Login may be required for submission. Page load confirmed fixed from #353.
wrtn.verdict: PARTIAL — page load OK, submit needs login or alternative input method

blackbox.details: Redirected to app.blackbox.ai. Page title loads but content area is completely blank — no input field, no chat UI rendered. Same behavior as #353. Likely JavaScript rendering failure through MITM proxy.

dola.details: Redirected to dola.com/chat/. Skeleton loading UI appears (gray placeholder blocks) but actual content never renders. Chat interface never becomes interactive. WebSocket-based service may have issues through MITM proxy.

key_findings: consensus.app: APF keyword blocking CONFIRMED working (400 Bad Request)
wrtn.ai: Page load FIXED (was ERR_H2 in #353), but submit failed (login/React issue)
blackbox.ai: STILL BROKEN — blank page, JS rendering failure persists
dola.com: STILL BROKEN — loading stuck, WebSocket service incompatible with MITM
